expectations.text: Runs all five gates explicitly and in order (trade-screen, setup-match, trade-planner, state-check, cost-check).
expectations.evidence: Runs G1..G5 explicitly, in order, with headers.

expectations.text: Applies concrete G1 thresholds (price ~$1-20, float <10M/<20M, rvol >=5x, catalyst, already moving) to the GENI facts rather than vague approval.
expectations.evidence: G1 applies price $1-20, float <10M prime, rvol >=5x, catalyst, +18% as pass/fail.

expectations.text: For G3, runs/uses the sizer and reports R:R 3.0 (reward $0.90 / risk $0.30) with a computed share size.
States a GO/NO-GO (or CANDIDATE/MATCH) verdict for each gate.
Makes clear no entry happens unless all gates are GO (enforces the hard rule).
expectations.evidence: 'all five must be GO to enter', 'chain halts at Gate 3'.

expectations.text: Frames the output as process/discipline, not a naked buy/sell recommendation or price prediction.
